extraction.one_line_summary: LUTSENKO attacked 5km from summit of final climb, held off KRISTOFF's chase to win while sprint favorite retained red jersey by 3 seconds
tactical_patterns: VAN HECKE Preben solo bridged from early break on climb, forcing CCC to chase long before critical finale
LUTSENKO Alexey timed GC move with 5km climbing remaining, gap small enough that sprinter KRISTOFF salvaged jersey by 3s
CCC controlled entirely for VAN AVERMAET Greg but spent team before final climb, unable to deliver sprint

rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: Former U23 world champion converting climbing strength to stage wins, dangerous on hilly finishes with tactical timing
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: positive: Pure sprinter limiting losses to 3 seconds on summit finish shows exceptional climbing form for classification defense
rider_signals.VAN HECKE Preben: positive: Dropped break companions on climb, forced peloton work despite ultimately being caught before finale
rider_signals.VAN AVERAET Greg: negative: CCC exhausted team controlling race for him but delivered nothing at finish, questioning leadership choice
